exercises.title: Extract Interactions
exercises.description: Count two-qubit interactions in a circuit.
exercises.starterCode:
def extract_interactions(gates):
    # gates: list of (name, qubits) tuples
    # Return: dict mapping (q0, q1) -> count
    pass

gates = [
    ('CX', (0, 1)),
    ('H', (2,)),
    ('CX', (0, 1)),
    ('CX', (1, 2)),
    ('CX', (0, 2)),
]
interactions = extract_interactions(gates)
print(f"Interactions: {interactions}")
